auth.signInDescription: Sign in to your EnpiAI account
auth.createAccountDescription: Start automating your Herbalife business today

subscribe.title: Activate Your License
subscribe.subtitle: To access all automation, CRM, and AI tools, select the plan that best fits your business.
subscribe.noPlans: No plans available at this time. Contact the platform administrator.
subscribe.securePaymentDescription: All payments are securely processed through dLocal Go, the leading payment gateway in Latin America. Your financial information is never stored on our servers.
subscribe.paymentUrlError: Could not generate payment URL. Contact the administrator.

admin.billingDescription: Manage subscription plans, dLocal Go integration, and courtesy accounts.
admin.plansDescription: All available plans. Inactive plans will not be shown to distributors.
admin.createPlanDescription: The plan will be automatically synced with dLocal Go. If credentials are not configured, it will be saved locally.
admin.distributorsDescription: Manage access for all registered distributors. You can grant or revoke courtesy membership manually.
admin.integrationNote: The system communicates with the environment configured in your .env file. If credentials are incomplete, plans will be saved locally only.
admin.courtesyNote: Courtesy accounts completely bypass the payment process. Useful for VIPs, internal testing, or distributors in a grace period.
admin.createCourtesyDescription: Create a new distributor who can use the platform without going through the payment gateway. A temporary password will be generated.
admin.noPlans: No plans created yet. Click "New Plan" to get started.

adminDocuments.title: System Knowledge
adminDocuments.description: Upload documents to the universal RAG memory. All distributor agents will use this knowledge.
adminDocuments.knowledgeBaseNote: Documents uploaded here form the global knowledge base. All distributor AI agents will access this information alongside their own private documents.
adminDocuments.noDocumentsNote: Upload PDF, TXT or MD files to build the universal knowledge base.

agentSetup.title: Agent Setup
agentSetup.description: Personalize your AI assistant. These settings define how the agent introduces itself and behaves in conversations with your leads.
agentSetup.profileDescription: Give your agent a name and personality. Both fields are optional — the agent works perfectly with default settings.
agentSetup.agentNameHelp: The name your agent will use when greeting customers. Leave blank for the default "Asistente".
agentSetup.agentPersonalityPlaceholder: e.g. You are a friendly wellness coach who specializes in nutrition. Always greet users warmly and ask about their health goals.
agentSetup.agentPersonalityHelp: Describe how you want the agent to behave. If left empty, the agent will use a professional, friendly default style.

channels.title: Channels
channels.description: Connect your messaging channels so your AI agent can talk to your leads automatically.
channels.emailDesc: Send emails from your own address
channels.whatsappNotConnected: WhatsApp is not connected. Connect a number to start receiving messages from your leads.
channels.googleIntegrationDesc: Connect your Google account to enable automatic meeting scheduling (Google Calendar) and email sending (Gmail).

documents.title: Knowledge Base
documents.description: Upload PDF/TXT documents to train your AI agent.
documents.documentsCount: {{count}} documents indexed in your personalized knowledge base.

wellness.title: Wellness Center
wellness.description: Manage evaluations and generate health reports.
wellness.recentEvaluationsDesc: A list of all wellness checks submitted by prospects and customers.

playground.title: Agent Playground
playground.description: Test your AI agent in real-time. Messages are sent to your configured agent.
playground.startTesting: Send a message to start testing your agent.
playground.typeMessage: Type a message to test your agent...
playground.helpText: Press Enter to send. This playground uses your configured agent and RAG knowledge base.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your profile and distributor preferences.
settings.personalInfoDesc: Your basic profile and contact details.
settings.apiAccessDesc: Use this key to access the OpenAI-compatible API endpoint for external integrations.
